name: apple-numbers
description: Read and write Apple Numbers spreadsheets - read tables, create files, update cells, manage sheets/tables, search, import CSV/TSV/JSON, and export data (macOS only).

interface.shortDescription: Read and write Apple Numbers spreadsheets.
interface.longDescription: A macOS Apple Numbers connector for Codex that uses the apple-numbers-mcp server to read tables, cells, and file structure (via numbers-parser, offline, cross-platform), and to create files, update cells, manage sheets and tables, write formulas and styles, merge cells, search, import CSV/TSV/JSON, and export data (writes drive Numbers.app via AppleScript and need macOS plus the Automation permission).
defaultPrompt: Read the first table in my budget spreadsheet and total column B.
Find every cell containing "overdue" in this Numbers file.
Import this CSV into a new Numbers spreadsheet.
